title: neomammillaria guerreronis var. subhamata
intro: Neomammillaria guerreronis var. subhamata, also known as the "Mexican Powder Puff," is a type of cactus that belongs to the Mammillaria genus. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Neomammillaria guerreronis var. subhamata include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
